mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form(id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses) VALUES (#{formId}, #{ownerId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{costCredits}, #{maxResponses})
INSERT INTO form_section(id, form_id, order_index, title) VALUES (#{sectionId}, #{formId}, #{orderIndex}, #{title})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses FROM form WHERE id = #{formId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM survey_response WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND quality_flag = 'pass'
SELECT id, owner_id, title, description, status, cost_credits, max_responses FROM form WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT f.id, f.owner_id, f.title, f.description, f.status, f.cost_credits, f.max_responses FROM form f WHERE f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND f.owner_id != #{viewerId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM survey_response r WHERE r.form_id = f.id AND r.respondent_id = #{viewerId} ) ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT id FROM form_section WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT type FROM form_question WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_question( id, section_id, form_id, type, title, required, order_index, min_select, max_select, min_length, max_length, regex, scale_min, scale_max) VALUES ( #{questionId}, #{sectionId}, #{formId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{required}, #{orderIndex}, #{minSelect}, #{maxSelect}, #{minLength}, #{maxLength}, #{regex}, #{scaleMin}, #{scaleMax})
INSERT INTO form_question_option(id, question_id, label, order_index) VALUES (#{optionId}, #{questionId}, #{label}, #{orderIndex})
mapper.update: UPDATE form SET status = 'ACTIVE', cost_credits = #{cost}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE form SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{formId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT id, section_id, form_id, type, title, required, order_index, min_select, max_select, min_length, max_length, regex, scale_min, scale_max FROM form_question WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
SELECT label FROM form_question_option WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY order_index ASC
